allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command rustc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo build 2>&1 | tail -60")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo build 2>&1 | tail -40")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo test 2>&1 | tail -60")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo test 2>&1 | tail -40")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "which gh && gh --version | head -1")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo build 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc "cd '/mnt/d/- - CODING/RUST/horizon-firehose' && cargo test --quiet 2>&1 | tail -10")
